# xFinance Rental AI (MCP handoff) — v1.1

> Public landing + self-contained integration guide for the white-label **Rental AI** HTTP API.
> Target: MCP tool authors, agent builders, partner platforms, LLM crawlers.

**Product & production API:** [atx.fintech-advisor.ai](https://atx.fintech-advisor.ai/)

## Primary Documentation (read these first)

- [README.md](README.md) — auth, endpoints, quickstarts, MCP tool recommendations, token metering
- [docs/mcp-implementation-guide.md](docs/mcp-implementation-guide.md) — streaming, polling, error handling, production patterns, TS reference code
- [examples/mcp-server/](examples/mcp-server/) — copy-paste ready minimal stdio MCP server (TypeScript)

## Machine-Readable Contract

- [openapi/rental-ai.yaml](openapi/rental-ai.yaml) — OpenAPI 3.1, rental-ai paths & schemas only (pinned mirror)
- Live: `GET https://atx.fintech-advisor.ai/api/openapi` (filter tag `rental-ai`)

## Short Index

- Auth: Bearer `atxr_<id>_<secret>` with scopes `chat | strategy | analyze`
- Chat: POST /api/ai/rent/chat (JSON or SSE) — returns markdown + `x-rental-tokens-*` headers
- Strategy: POST /api/ai/rent/strategy → 202 jobId → GET ?jobId= poll
- Analyze: same async job pattern
- Guardrails: per-tenant daily token budget (default 200k), concurrency limits, strict isolation

## Private Implementation (for operators only)

Full source, personas, billing, and ops runbooks live in the `atx-trusted-advisor` monorepo.
Public handoff docs are deliberately sufficient for 90%+ of MCP / agent integration work.

**Current handoff version:** 1.1 (Phase 1 API contract)
